opinion.h: CERTIFIED CREDIT CORP. v. BOWERS, 375 U.S. 84 (1963)
CERTIFIED CREDIT CORP. v. BOWERS, TAX COMMISSIONER OF OHIO. APPEAL FROM THE SUPREME COURT OF OHIO. No. 430. Decided November 18, 1963.
opinion.p: Appeal dismissed for want of a substantial federal question.
Robert L. Barton, Joseph B. DeVennish and Joseph R. Hague for appellant.
William B. Saxbe, Attorney General of Ohio, and Daronne R. Tate, Assistant Attorney General, for appellee.
The motion to dismiss is granted and the appeal is dismissed for want of a substantial federal question.
